task_completion.description: A rectangular room is drawn on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangular shape representing the server room should be visible on the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: An Air Handling Unit (AHU) is present and labeled 'AHU-1'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An AHU symbol should be placed inside the room, accompanied by the exact text label 'AHU-1'.

task_completion.description: Two Supply Diffusers are present and connected to the AHU.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two distinct Supply Diffuser symbols should be visible, with lines or duct shapes visually connecting them back to the AHU.

task_completion.description: The duct path connecting the AHU to the diffusers is labeled 'Supply Air'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Supply Air' should be placed along or near the duct path/lines connecting the AHU and the Supply Diffusers.

task_completion.description: One Return Grille is present and labeled 'Return Air'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Return Grille symbol should be visible in the diagram, accompanied by the exact text label 'Return Air'.

task_completion.description: The project is saved as an .eddx file and exported as a .png file in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax window title or save dialog should show 'server_room_hvac.eddx', and a file manager or terminal should show both 'server_room_hvac.eddx' and 'server_room_hvac.png' in the ~/Documents directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application open with the diagram being actively edited on the canvas, rather than terminal commands generating the files.

integrity.description: The diagram was built using individual symbols and shapes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas should show distinct selectable elements (room, AHU, diffusers, grille, text boxes) from the EdrawMax library, not a single pasted image from an external source.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply create empty files or text files with the target extensions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported .png and saved .eddx files should be the result of the EdrawMax save/export dialogs, not 'touch' or 'echo' commands in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output paths are /home/ga/Documents/server_room_hvac.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/server_room_hvac.png. The diagram must contain the exact text labels: 'AHU-1', 'Supply Air', and 'Return Air'. The diagram should be constructed using HVAC-related symbols corresponding to keywords like Duct, Diffuser, Grille, AHU, Fan, Terminal, or Pipe.
